Established in 1994, Breast Cancer Foundation NZ is a not-for-profit, non-government
organisation (NGO)that provides breast cancer education and awareness,medical
research, training grants,advocacy and supports Kiwis with breast cancer.Ourvision is
zero deathsfrombreast cancer.Currently,over3,6ooKiwis are diagnosed withbreast
cancerand over 65O die from breast cancer every year.BCFNZ's programmes are
evidence-based and overseen by its medical advisory committee. United by our goals, we
are driven to make a difference in the lives of New Zealanders affected by breast cancer
while pushing for new frontiers in early detection and treatment.
You'llbe joining a talented, vibrant and supportive team that values diversity and an
inclusive workplace.With conveniently located offices in Parnell, we fostera healthy,
positive, fun and encouraging work environment.
You'll have exposure to a unique environment with its finger on the pulse of the latest
research,andreal satisfactionin knowing that yourwork contributes directlyto the
wellbeing of the people of Aotearoa, New Zealand.
We are family-friendly, with flexible working hours and hybrid working arrangements. We
are committed to equal employment opportunities and welcome applications from
everyone who can meet the requirements of the role.
